summary: Both backend (20/20 pytest passed) and frontend core flows verified. Landing page loads with 3D R3F Hero canvas (no breaking errors - babel patch working), 6 package cards render, language ES↔EN toggle works, BookingModal opens & POSTs /api/bookings returning 200 with WhatsApp success link, admin login redirects wrong creds stay / correct creds → /admin/dashboard, stats cards visible, booking list shows test rows, PATCH confirm and DELETE work (both 200), logout redirects to home. Backend auth/bookings/stats all pass with bcrypt $2b$ hash confirmed, admin auto-seed verified, 401/403 guards working.

minor.issue: Cookie has secure=False and samesite='lax'; fine for same-site preview but will not be sent on cross-site prod; frontend correctly falls back to Bearer token in localStorage so flow still works.

ui_bugs.issue: React 'Encountered two children with the same key' warning repeats on open (inside AnimatePresence). Likely duplicate key on mapped items (price breakdown or alert). Non-fatal but noisy.

Using browser native HTML5 date picker (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of shadcn Calendar/Popover component. Looks inconsistent with the dark tactical theme and the format is locale-dependent (US format shown even though language is Spanish).

issues: Deposit $300 MXN is HIGHER than individual package total ($160/$190/$240), so 'Pagar el día de la visita' shows $0 MXN but user is effectively overpaying vs the package price. Business decision but creates confusing UX — consider capping deposit at package_price or adjusting the copy for cheap packages.
Action buttons layout is dense; 'CONFIRMAR / COMPLETAR / CANCELAR / trash' row may wrap awkwardly on narrower screens (tested at 1920 only, looked fine).

action_items: Fix duplicate React key warning inside BookingModal's AnimatePresence mapped list
Replace native <input type=date> with shadcn Calendar+Popover in BookingModal for consistent dark-theme UX and proper i18n format
Decide product behaviour when deposit ($300) exceeds individual package price ($160/$190/$240) — either cap deposit or adjust copy
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers (FastAPI 0.110+).
Single-file server.py (~333 lines) is acceptable but auth/models/bookings could be split into routers for maintainability as it grows.
Login endpoint has NO rate limiting / brute-force lockout (playbook requires 5-attempt lockout) — currently unlimited login attempts possible.
access_token cookie uses secure=False which is insecure for production; should be driven by env (e.g., ENV=production → secure=True, samesite='none').
CORS uses allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True — this combination is rejected by browsers and is a misconfig; must list explicit origins when credentials=True.
No pagination on /api/admin/bookings (hard-coded .to_list(1000)) — will break when bookings exceed 1000.
seed_data_creation: Test bookings created during pytest runs prefixed with TEST_ and cleaned up in test_zzz_cleanup. Playwright test also created and deleted one TEST_DashboardBooking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at https://gotcha-paintball-3d.preview.emergentagent.com/api is fully functional. 20 pytest cases cover auth (login/me/bearer/cookie), public booking creation + validation, admin CRUD (list sorted desc, patch, delete), stats, and bcrypt hash format. Frontend Hero canvas renders (R3F primitives fix via patched visual-edits babel plugin is working). Known low-priority issues: React duplicate-key warning in BookingModal, native HTML5 date picker instead of shadcn Calendar, brute-force rate limit missing, CORS misconfig (origins=*+credentials=true), deprecated startup event. Admin login error display is controlled by data-testid='admin-error' (not generic .error class).
